message:
fix: rename Predictive Health Monitor to AI Cluster Issue Predictor (#8845) (#8895)

The `console_ai_offline_detection` card title "Predictive Health Monitor"
was confusingly similar to the existing `predictive_health` card titled
"Predictive Health". Both names suggested overlapping responsibilities,
making it hard for users to tell them apart in card pickers and
dashboards.

Rename the AI offline detection card to "AI Cluster Issue Predictor":

- Leads with "AI" to highlight the distinguishing feature (root-cause
  grouping + AI inference) versus the trend-based forecasting card.
- Uses "Issue" instead of "Health" to reflect the detection and
  grouping semantics (offline / GPU / resource issues).

Updated the title in cardMetadata.ts, all 9 locale `cards.json` files
(no real translations existed — same English string was copy-pasted),
and the file-header comment in ConsoleOfflineDetectionCard.tsx.

Fixes #8845

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

-  console_ai_offline_detection: 'Predictive Health Monitor',
+  console_ai_offline_detection: 'AI Cluster Issue Predictor',
